entries.claim_text: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language: Enhancing Code Completion in Pharo
entries.quoted_snippet: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language

entries.claim_text: Kilian Kier, Alessandro Giagnorio, Omar AbedelKader, Oleksandr Zaitsev, Robert Peharz, Romain Robbes, Gabriele Bavota, Stéphane Ducasse
entries.quoted_snippet: Kilian Kier

entries.claim_text: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18833238
paper
entries.quoted_snippet: IEEEtran

entries.claim_text: Python 在 GitHub 上有約 26M 個公開 repo
entries.quoted_snippet: 26M public repositories

entries.claim_text: Tonel 檔案格式混合了程式碼與 metadata
entries.quoted_snippet: it mixes code and its metadata

entries.claim_text: #name : 'ClassName',
entries.quoted_snippet: #name : 'ClassName',

entries.claim_text: 上半的 `Class { ... }` 是宣告 metadata，下半才是實際 method
entries.quoted_snippet: General structure of a Tonel file

entries.claim_text: 控制流程如 `if`、`while` 不是語法關鍵字，而是普通的 method
entries.quoted_snippet: are not part of the syntax but are simple methods

entries.claim_text: 因為目標是能在開發者機器上跑、滿足即時延遲的 in-IDE 補全
entries.quoted_snippet: in-IDE code completion---rather than offline code generation---that operates under strict latency constraints

entries.claim_text: 降到 415 個 repo
entries.quoted_snippet: reduced the number of repositories from 748 to 415

entries.claim_text: 隨機挑一個含 3–10 個 token 的 AST 節點來遮罩
entries.quoted_snippet: randomly mask an AST node containing between 3 and 10 tokens

entries.claim_text: 最終 fine-tuning 資料集為 **324,725** 筆
entries.quoted_snippet: final training dataset for fine-tuning contains 324,725 instances

entries.claim_text: Qwen2.5 Coder Base（0.5B / 1.5B / 3B / 7B）與 Mellum-base（4B）
entries.quoted_snippet: Qwen2.5 Coder Base \cite{Hui24a} (0.5B, 1.5B, 3B, and 7B parameters) and Mellum-base

entries.claim_text: 把 HumanEval+ 的 164 題用 GPT-4o 初譯成 Pharo
entries.quoted_snippet: we obtained 164 \pharo tasks from the original Python benchmark

entries.claim_text: HumanEval+ AST-aware | 2,274
entries.quoted_snippet: HumanEval+ AST-aware   &  2{,}274

entries.claim_text: base checkpoint 的 `pass@1` 為 71.48%，經 pre-training + fine-tuning（SFT）後升到 **83.73%（+12.25）**
entries.quoted_snippet: increases from 71.48\% for the base model to 83.73\% for the \SFT version (+12.25\%)

entries.claim_text: base 模型的失敗有 65.6% 是語法錯誤
entries.quoted_snippet: 65.6\%) due to syntax errors

entries.claim_text: method-level（`pass@1`，節錄）
entries.quoted_snippet: pass@1

entries.claim_text: 特化的 3B / 7B 不只**超過** Qwen3 Coder 480B（後者參數約多 60–320 倍
entries.quoted_snippet: 320$\times$ more parameters
ChrF increases from 60.05\% to 75.96\%

entries.claim_text: random methods 在 48 個 model-metric 比較中有 37 個優於 class/package 簽章，但始終不如 impacted methods
entries.quoted_snippet: the \textit{random methods} strategy outperforms the \textit{class / package signatures} ones in 37 out of 48 cases, but it is always less effective than the \textit{impacted methods} strategy

entries.claim_text: 記憶體從 14.19 GiB 降到 4.36 GiB（約 −70%）
entries.quoted_snippet: from 14.19 GiB to 4.36 GiB

entries.claim_text: 從 22 個測試 repo 的 488 個開發者 commit 挖出改動，共 2,185 個任務
entries.quoted_snippet: we collect 488 commits performed by developers in public GitHub repositories

entries.claim_text: repo-level benchmark 共 2,185 個 repository-level completion 任務（每個 context 策略下各評測一次）
entries.quoted_snippet: resulted in 2{,}185 repository-level completion tasks evaluated under each context policy

entries.claim_text: 從 415 個 subject repo 共抽出 387,159 個 Pharo method
entries.quoted_snippet: we extracted a total of 387{,}159 \pharo methods from the 415 subject repositories

entries.claim_text: 從 22 個測試 repo 挖 commit
entries.quoted_snippet: We mine commits from the 22 test repositories collected

entries.claim_text: 這個「勝出」**只發生在 r-AST 與 repo-level**
entries.quoted_snippet: the large models have the edge on the AST-aware benchmark

entries.claim_text: repo-level 完全沒有可執行測試
entries.quoted_snippet: the repository-level evaluation lacks executable test cases

entries.claim_text: 沒有 fine-tuning-only 的對照
entries.quoted_snippet: a fine-tuned-only baseline could have provided an additional point of comparison

entries.claim_text: 本文真正的貢獻偏向**工程整合與領域落地**
entries.quoted_snippet: The effort involved in this significantly exceeded the effort in training the models themselves

entries.claim_text: 所有評測都是「遮罩—補回」的模擬
entries.quoted_snippet: it remains a simulation of editing behavior rather than a live IDE study

entries.claim_text: repo-level CrystalBLEU 從 35.96% 升到 58.99%（+23.03）
entries.quoted_snippet: CrystalBLEU increases from 35.96\% to 58.99\%

entries.claim_text: Claude 4.5 Sonnet 在 impacted methods 下 repo-level ChrF 83.02%、CrystalBLEU 70.52%
entries.quoted_snippet: achieving a ChrF score of 83.02\% and CrystalBLEU of 70.52\%

entries.claim_text: 量化 7B 在 M3 Max CPU 延遲約 1.33 秒
entries.quoted_snippet: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B - SFT (4-bit) & 4.36 GiB & $1.332$

entries.claim_text: 量化 7B 在 RX 7800XT GPU 延遲約 0.53 秒
未量化 3B 在 M4 Max 延遲約 0.62 秒
entries.quoted_snippet: Qwen 2.5 Coder 3B - SFT & 5.75 GiB & $0.620$

entries.claim_text: 未量化 3B 在 M3 Max 延遲約 0.73 秒
entries.quoted_snippet: Qwen 2.5 Coder 3B - SFT & 5.75 GiB & $0.725$

entries.claim_text: 量化後 method-level pass@1 平均只掉 0.61%
entries.quoted_snippet: the pass@1 metric decreased by 0.61\%, on average

entries.claim_text: 過去被視為 low-resource 的 Lua（620k）、Julia（85k）、Racket（23k）repo 數
entries.quoted_snippet: Lua (620k public repositories on GitHub), Julia (85k), and Racket (23k)
